name: KC'S DBA CRACK'D POT RESTAURANT & BAKERY

violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Reachin coolers in the cook-line and the pie display cooler have debris build up.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted not properly labeled in the walk in cooler.

POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of salads soups ingredients was noted not being properly dated for disposition in the walk in cooler.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Pressure fryer and oven exteriors have debris build up.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Warming area counter noted not in good repair. The kitchen side edge of counter top is peeling apart.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Adequate ventilation noted not present in the employee bathroom.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Soap and hand drying disposable towels was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the waitress station.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Observed various food equipment (i.e; microwave interiors soup kettle and pressure fryer) components not adequately cleaned between uses.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in kitchen.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Warming area counter noted not in good repair. Observed counter surface beginning to delaminate and create voids in the surface making it more difficult to properly clean.
